summary: A publisher's book description and biographical summary of Robert Langer, detailing his early struggles against conventional scientific thinking, his prolific patent record, and his overarching mission to improve human healthcare.

principles.statement: Research should be pursued with the ultimate goal of improving human health and society.
principles.rationale: This serves as the foundational motivation for his extensive work in biotechnology and tissue engineering.
principles.source_quote: make the world a better place and transform human healthcare.

signature_quotes.text: make the world a better place and transform human healthcare.
signature_quotes.context: Describing his overarching effort and goal in pursuing research in biotechnology and tissue engineering.
